items.title: US government watchdog to investigate Epstein files release
items.description: The justice department's inspector general will review the withholding and overdue release of secret files.

items.title: Signed Oasis 'Wonderwall' guitar sells for $96,000
items.description: The guitar was played on the band's second album (What's the Story) Morning Glory by Noel Gallagher.

items.title: Meta says it will cut 8,000 jobs as AI spending grows
items.description: The cuts, which employees had been expecting for weeks, will be Meta's largest layoff since 2023.

items.title: Watch: Girl describes finding rare Mexican axolotl in Wales
items.description: Evie, 10, tells the BBC about finding the axolotl - named Dippy - and bringing it home to Leicester.

items.title: Proxy attacks in UK a real and growing concern, says PM
items.description: The prime minister says he is increasingly worried a number of countries are behind attacks in the UK.
